fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 61 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), allowing adjacent bookings. It should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly reject them as per the test specification.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap check should produce the same result as the corrected logic.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must not contain any adjacent or overlapping bookings.

spec.expr: all(b__1 != s and a__1 != e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new window's start/end times must not touch any existing window's end/start times.
